s: In 1973, Craig Skok suited up for BOS as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 6.280, WHIP 1.600, SO 22, WAR 0.400.
Changed teams after the previous season (BOS -> TEX).

Changed teams after the previous season (TEX -> ATL).
